Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson

Class BsonOutputStream

java.lang.Object
java.io.OutputStream
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson.BsonOutputStream
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, Flushable, AutoCloseable
public class BsonOutputStream extends OutputStream
Specialized output stream for serializing BSON (Binary JSON) streams.

BSON uses little-endian byte order for all multi-byte values. Documents are length-prefixed: the total byte count (int32) must appear before the content. Since the size is unknown until all elements are written, each document is buffered in a ByteArrayOutputStream child. When complete, the size is calculated and [int32 size][content][0x00] is written to the parent stream.

Notes:
  • This class is not intended for external use.
See Also:

    Creates a child BsonOutputStream for buffering a nested document.
    byte[]
    endDocument()
    Finalize the current document and return the bytes (int32 size + content + 0x00).

    Returns whether we are currently buffering a document.

    Begin buffering a new document.

    void
    write(byte[] b, int off, int len)
     
    void
    write(int b)
     
    void
    writeBinary(byte[] data)
    Writes BSON binary (int32 length + subtype byte + raw bytes).
    void
    writeBoolean(boolean value)
    Writes a boolean (1 byte: 0x00=false, 0x01=true).
    void
    writeChildDocument(BsonOutputStream child)
    Writes the child document's content as an embedded document to this stream.
    void
    writeCString(String value)
    Writes a cstring (UTF-8 bytes + 0x00, no length prefix).
    void
    writeDateTime(long millis)
    Writes BSON datetime (int64, UTC milliseconds since epoch).
    void
    writeDecimal128(BigDecimal value)
    Writes BSON decimal128 (16 bytes, IEEE 754-2008) from BigDecimal.
    void
    writeDocumentTo(OutputStream parent)
    Finalize the current document and write it to the parent stream.
    void
    writeDouble(double value)
    Writes an IEEE 754 double (8 bytes, little-endian).
    void
    writeElement(int type, String name)
    Writes a BSON element header (type byte + cstring name).
    void
    writeInt32(int value)
    Writes a 32-bit integer (4 bytes, little-endian).
    void
    writeInt64(long value)
    Writes a 64-bit integer (8 bytes, little-endian).
    void
    writeLE4(int value)
    Writes a 4-byte little-endian integer.
    void
    writeLE8(long value)
    Writes an 8-byte little-endian long.
    void
    writeNull()
    Writes BSON null (no value bytes).
    void
    writeString(String value)
    Writes a BSON string (int32 length + UTF-8 bytes + 0x00).

      public byte[] endDocument()

      Returns:
      The complete document bytes.

      public void writeDocumentTo(OutputStream parent)
      Finalize the current document and write it to the parent stream.
      Parameters:
      parent - The parent output stream.

      public void writeElement(int type, String name)
      Writes a BSON element header (type byte + cstring name).
      Parameters:
      type - The BSON type code.
      name - The element name (cstring).

      value - The 32-bit value.

      Writes an 8-byte little-endian long.

      value - The 64-bit value.

      Writes an IEEE 754 double (8 bytes, little-endian).
      Parameters:
      value - The double value.

    • writeInt32

      public void writeInt32(int value)
      Writes a 32-bit integer (4 bytes, little-endian).
      Parameters:
      value - The integer value.

    • writeInt64

      public void writeInt64(long value)
      Writes a 64-bit integer (8 bytes, little-endian).
      Parameters:
      value - The long value.

    • writeBoolean

      public void writeBoolean(boolean value)
      Writes a boolean (1 byte: 0x00=false, 0x01=true).
      Parameters:
      value - The boolean value.

    • writeNull

      public void writeNull()
      Writes BSON null (no value bytes).

    • writeString

      public void writeString(String value)
      Writes a BSON string (int32 length + UTF-8 bytes + 0x00).
      Parameters:
      value - The string to write (treated as empty if null).

    • writeCString

      public void writeCString(String value)
      Writes a cstring (UTF-8 bytes + 0x00, no length prefix).
      Parameters:
      value - The string to write (treated as empty if null).

    • writeBinary

      public void writeBinary(byte[] data)
      Writes BSON binary (int32 length + subtype byte + raw bytes).
      Parameters:
      data - The raw bytes (subtype 0x00 generic).

    • writeDateTime

      public void writeDateTime(long millis)
      Writes BSON datetime (int64, UTC milliseconds since epoch).
      Parameters:
      millis - The UTC milliseconds since epoch.

    • writeDecimal128

      public void writeDecimal128(BigDecimal value)
      Writes BSON decimal128 (16 bytes, IEEE 754-2008) from BigDecimal.
      Parameters:
      value - The decimal value.

    • createChild

      public BsonOutputStream createChild()
      Creates a child BsonOutputStream for buffering a nested document.
      Returns:
      A new child stream (no parent; use writeChildDocument(org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson.BsonOutputStream) to embed).

    • writeChildDocument

      public void writeChildDocument(BsonOutputStream child)
      Writes the child document's content as an embedded document to this stream.
      Parameters:
      child - The child stream (must have been finalized via endDocument).

    • isInDocument

      public boolean isInDocument()
      Returns whether we are currently buffering a document.
      Returns:
      true if buffering, false otherwise.
